hero.title: Ulawulo kunye nemodeli yogcino
hero.lead: I-IATF igcina iiprojekthi zokufikeleleka zisesidlangalaleni, zifundeka, kwaye zilondolozeka.
support: Eli phepha lichaza ukuba yintoni ebandakanyekayo, ukuba zigcinwa njani iindawo zokugcina izinto, kwaye yintoni uxanduva kwinqanaba lokugcina izinto olusebenzayo emva kokwamkelwa.

cards.title: Umsebenzi ofanelekileyo
paragraphs: I-IATF yamkela umsebenzi ojongene nomqobo wokwenyani wokufikeleleka kwaye unexabiso elicacileyo loluntu.
Iprojekthi kufuneka ibe luncedo ngaphaya kokuhamba komsebenzi wabucala kwaye isebenze njengendawo yokugcina yoluntu.
Ukufikeleleka kwiWebhu, i-IATF isebenzisa [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Amava ngqo abasebenzisi bobugcisa bokuncedisa abubungqina bokwenyani bokusebenza ekusebenziseni okwenyani.

cards.title: Ukwamkelwa kweprojekthi
paragraphs: Isiphakamiso sinokwamkelwa xa uphononongo lubonisa ukuba:
items: kukho indlela ebonakalayo yokufumana ulondolozo okanye ukugqitywa

cards.title: Ubunini bendawo yokugcina
paragraphs: Iiprojekthi ezamkelweyo zenziwa phantsi kombutho we-IATF GitHub.
Iindawo zokugcina izinto zihlala apho ukuze iprojekthi nganye igcine ikhaya loluntu elizinzileyo, nokuba abagcini bayatshintsha kamva.

cards.title: Iilayisensi
paragraphs: Iiprojekthi ze-IATF zisebenzisa iilayisensi ze-copyleft ngaphandle kokuba iprojekthi ithi ngenye indlela:

maintainer.title: Injineli enoxanduva okanye umgcini
paragraphs: Iprojekthi nganye eyamkelweyo kufuneka ibe negcisa elinoxanduva okanye umgcini. Loo mntu angafumana ufikelelo lolawulo kwindawo yogcino kwaye kulindeleke ukuba:
items: ukuphonononga okanye ukulawula imiba nokukhupha izicelo
maintainer.footnote: Olu luxanduva lwenqanaba lokugcina. Ubunini benkampani buhlala ne-IATF. Uxanduva apha kukuphathwa kwendawo yokugcina, ulwalathiso lobuchwephesha, kunye nolungelelwaniso loluntu  hayi ukuhanjiswa kwangasese okungenamda, ukudityaniswa kwesiko, okanye izibophelelo zenqanaba lenkonzo ngaphandle kwemephu yendlela yoluntu.

publicDevelopment.title: Uphuhliso loluntu
paragraphs: Iiprojekthi eziqaliswe nge-IATF ziphuhliswa esidlangalaleni ngokuzenzekelayo.
publicDevelopment.footnote: Ulwazi olubalulekileyo lweprojekthi akufuneki luphile kuphela kwiingxoxo zabucala okanye kwiibhokisi zeposi.

paragraphs: IATF isebenza esidlangalaleni ngokuzenzekelayo. Izicelo ezingena kwi-IATF ngokusebenzisa iwebhusayithi, i-imeyile, iDiscord, iGitHub, okanye ezinye iindlela ze-IATA zinokuba ziirekhodi zezicelo zikawonkewonke.

Ingxelo yesicelo esisesidlangalaleni ayingomyalezo wokuqala. IATF ingasishwankathela, silungise, okanye silungelelanise isicelo phambi kokupapashwa ukuze imfuneko yokufikeleleka ihlolwe ngaphandle kokutyhila ulwazi lomntu siqu olungeyomfuneko.
Iirekhodi zezicelo zikawonke-wonke zingagcinwa kwi-IATF GitHub umbutho, kule webhusayithi, okanye zombini.

Phambi kokupapashwa, i-IATF isusa iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano ezingafunekiyo, iidilesi zabucala, kunye neenkcukacha zokuchonga malunga nabasebenzisi ngabanye bobugcisa bokuncedisa ngaphandle kokuba ukupapashwa kuzimisele ngokucacileyo kwaye kufanelekile.

I-Discord isetyenziselwa ukulungelelanisa okungacwangciswanga. I-IATF ayigcini ngokwahlukeneyo iincoko ze-Disord ngokungagqibekanga, kwaye ukugcinwa kwemiyalezo kulawulwa yi-Descord. Izigqibo ezenziwe kwi-Dicord kufuneka zishwankathelwe kwingxelo yoluntu kwi-GitHub okanye kwiphepha leprojekthi elifanelekileyo.
Iirekhodi zesicelo azibandakanywa kwi-injini yokukhangela apho kusebenzayo khona. Uluntu luthetha ukuhlaziywa kunye noxanduva. Akuthethi ukuba kulungiselelwe ukufunyanwa ngokukhangela igama.

I-IATF inokuhlaziya okanye isuse iirekhodi ezivela kwiindawo zikawonke-wonke ezilawulwa yi-IATF, kodwa ayinakuqinisekisa ukususwa kwii-caches zomntu wesithathu, izaziso, iifolokhwe, izikrini, iinjini zokukhangela, iDiscord, okanye ezinye iinkqubo zangaphandle.
Ukuba umyalezo kufuneka uhlale uyimfihlo, musa ukuwuthumela ngeendlela zikawonke-wonke ze-IATF.

chair.lead: Usihlalo uphethe ulawulo lwe-IATF kwinqanaba lombutho. Oku kwahlukile kwindima yonjineli ojongene neprojekthi nganye: usihlalo unoxanduva lombutho uphela, hayi ulwalathiso lwemihla ngemihla loluphi na ugcino olunye.

duties.title: Into eyenziwa sisihlalo
items: Igcina iimvume zomnini kumbutho we-IATF GitHub
Ukutyikitya kwizigqibo zokwamkelwa kweeprojekthi nokugcinwa koovimba
duties.footnote: Usihlalo akazibopheleli kwi-IATF ekunikezeleni kwangasese, umsebenzi ohlawulelwayo, okanye izivumelwano zenqanaba lenkonzo, kwaye akazigqithisi izigqibo zomgcini-ndawo nganye malunga nolwalathiso lobugcisa.

election.title: Unyulo lonyaka
paragraphs: Usihlalo ukhethwa kanye ngonyaka. Unyulo luqhutywa kwiiveki ezimbini zokuqala zikaDisemba, iziphumo zibhengezwa ngoDisemba 15, kwaye ixesha elitsha liqala ngoJanuwari 1.

Abavoti abafanelekileyo ngabantu ababambe indima yomgcini nakweyiphi na indawo yokugcina i-IATF ngonyaka kwaye benza ubuncinci igalelo elinye lokudibanisa kwindawo yokugcina ye- IATF kuloo nyaka. Umvoti ngamnye ofanelekileyo unevoti enye. Umgqatswa onamavoti amaninzi uyaphumelela; kwimeko yokulingana, umjikelo wokugqibela ubanjwa kwiveki yesithathu kaDisemba.
Ukhetho luqhutywa njengengxoxo kawonke-wonke yeGitHub kwindawo egciniweyo yolawulo lwe-IATF, ngoko ke abaviwa, ivoti, kunye nesiphumo zonke ziyinxalenye yerekhodi loluntu.

continuity.title: Ukuqhubeka
paragraphs: Ukuba akukho nyulo lubanjwayo kunyaka onikiweyo, usihlalo okhoyo uyaqhubeka kwindima kude kube kunyulo olulandelayo. Oku kukuqhubeka okungapheliyo, hayi ixesha lokuxolelwa  imodeli yenzelwe ukugcina umbutho uzinzile xa umsebenzi uphantsi, hayi ukunyanzelisa inguqu ekungekho mntu ukulungeleyo.
USihlalo unokushiya isikhundla nangaliphi na ixesha. Abaphathi abasebenzayo banokubiza unyulo olungaqhelekanga ngesizathu esichaziweyo, esiqhutywa phantsi kwemigaqo efanayo nonyulo lonyaka.

chair.footnote: Indima yesitulo yabekwa ngokusemthethweni ngo-2026 ukwenza ulawulo kwinqanaba lombutho lucace. Kude kube lelo xesha, uxanduva lombutho lwalubanjwe ngokungacwangciswanga ngumsunguli.

states.title: Iimeko zeprojekthi
paragraphs: Iiprojekthi zisebenzisa iseti encinci yamazwe karhulumente:
states.footnote: La magunya agcina irejista kulula ukuyiskena.

reassignment.title: Ulwabiwo olutsha nokugcinwa kwee-archive
paragraphs: Ukuba umntu owenza ulondolozo uyemka okanye akasasebenzi, i-IATF ingasasaza uxanduva, ikhuphe uphuhliso, okanye igcine iprojekthi.
Iprojekthi ingalondolozwa xa imfuno yokuqala ihlangatyezwene nayo, ulondolozo luyekile, okanye umsebenzi oqhubekayo awusekho ngokoqobo.
reassignment.footnote: Iiprojekthi ezigciniweyo zihlala zibonakala esidlangalaleni ngaphandle kokuba kukho isizathu esibambekayo sokwenza ngenye indlela.

boundaries.footnote: I-IATF yimodeli yolondolozo loluntu, hayi inkonzo yokuhambisa yabucala.
